---
name: Task
about: A task to be completed to meet development targets
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**What:**
What needs changing? Where is the file? What will be the outcome? 

**Why:**
Why should this change take place, where and how will it be used?

**When:**
Does this rely on anything else being completed first? Does anything rely on this? 

**Definition of Done:**
What needs to be done to mark this request complete? I.e.
**what** implemented and tested, reviewed and merged to main.
